author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone 

Ecosystem Dashboard Update

The Star Atlas Economics Team added new data to the Ecosystem Dashboard!

Check out local market prices and volume:
 Click on a sector's circle to view available resources, their prices and trading volumes.
 Sort by date to track trends over time.

If you have a request for what data you'd like to be included in this Dashboard, tag myself or @Santi with your suggestions. Thank you!

 Stay informed: https://govern.staratlas.com/ecosystem-dashboard

Mentions: @Santi
